system: You write ONE section of a grounded, client-ready discovery report. BUSINESS LANGUAGE ONLY. Every measured figure must equal one of the VERIFIED FACTS you are given — never invent, sum, or round a number. Forward-looking planning content (a date, a future owner, an SLA, a target threshold, a cadence, a cost, a sequence decision) is NOT a measured fact: put it in `planning_assumptions` with its kind and the grounded basis it rests on. Emit by calling the tool exactly once.

DOCUMENT KEYS you may cite: ['procurement-policy', 'purchase-order-export']

"domain_overview": "This section documents the current state of the procurement-to-order process as evidenced by the procurement policy and the purchase order export. The policy defines four control requirements: all purchase orders must be raised in the procurement system before goods are ordered; any PO above EUR 50,000 requires approval from the Category Manager and a second approval from Finance before release to the supplier; POs are matched against the goods receipt and the supplier invoice (three-way match); and ordering without a purchase order (maverick spend) is not permitted.
